creator: aehlig@linta.de
text:
Created attachment 195910
patch to be applied to devel/bazel to update to 0.16.0

I'm sorry for the late reply; I was on vacation.

This is my patch to update devel/bazel to 0.16.0. There are two differences
with respect to the patch originally uploaded
- the final RC (which is code-wise identical with the release tar ball) for 0.16.0 is rc4, not rc3.
- the extra patch files/extra-i386_src_BUILD which is used for i386 only to at least build bazel is adapted as well.
